3138600.name: To Clean The Mountain Demo
3138600.description:
To Clean The Mountain is a platforming adventure where you throw yourself towards the summit. Cleans the corruption of the mountain while persevering to the top

Environments

Handcrafted levels based on a variety of mountainous landscapes. Each environment features unique mechanics for you to interact with and learn, combining the interesting platforming elements with puzzle solving.

The Mountain

Elements of the world change based on how you assist the mountain. The game is completable regardless of your choices, but the difficulty is up to you.

Demo

The demo features the first of 4 environments in the world. See how you enjoy the mechanics and feel free to give us any suggestions for future development
3138600.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
